channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz to reopen ‘soon’ as US, Iran head to talks
item.description: Trump says Washington will not accept Iran's imposition of a de facto toll booth system in the critical waterway.

item.title: Iran war live: US negotiators due to arrive in Pakistan for ceasefire talks
item.description: Lebanese Health Ministry says people killed in Israeli attacks since March 2 rises to 1,953 with 6,303 wounded.

item.title: Israeli strike on government building kills Lebanese officers
item.description: Israeli air strike on a government building in southern Lebanon’s Nabatieh kills at least 13.

item.title: Hezbollah rocket attack damages 1,500-year-old Israeli church
item.description: Hezbollah fired a barrage of rockets at northern Israel, damaging a 1,500-year-old Byzantine church in Nahariya.

item.title: Iranian delegation arrives in Islamabad for talks with US
item.description: A senior Iranian delegation has arrived in Islamabad for talks with US officials.

item.title: Islamabad on lockdown ahead of US-Iran talks
item.description: Islamabad has deployed more than 10,000 military and police personnel as US and Iranian delegations arrive.

item.title: US-Iran negotiations in Islamabad: What to expect?
item.description: US and Iranian delegations are set to meet in Islamabad for peace talks to end six weeks of war.

item.title: Can Iran negotiations lead to peace?
item.description: Redi Tlhabi speaks to former Iran and US diplomats on the hopes for negotiations to end the war in Iran.

item.title: New tensions emerge before US-Iran war ceasefire talks in Pakistan
item.description: Iranian official says conditions still not met before talks, as Trump re-ups threat of renewed attacks.

item.title: Is the US-Iran ceasefire already doomed?
item.description: Even if the talks fail to produce a deal, a return to an all-out war may still be averted.
